reason: Fase V.2 (on top of V.1): the verified MarsUI language extends systemically to the remaining components - additive focus-ring shadow tokens (the V.1 double mechanism: Focus/primary glow under the existing opaque WCAG indicator) on input/textarea/select/checkbox/radio/switch/tab/alert-dismiss, and deliberate effective-value changes: select listbox shadow joins the elevation ramp (e3, M3 override e2), card=e1 and dialog=e4 replace migrated M2 approximations, alert info/warning fg completes the per-tone em pattern, tabs divider becomes the 1px hairline, progress indicator snaps to the med-em 500 fill pattern, select/radio hovers move to the neutral em ramps. Every extrapolation beyond a direct Figma source is declared in token descriptions for founder ratification. Nothing is published yet (0.0.0, private).
